question: How many bikes do I currently own?

retrieval_results.context:
User will bring a road bike, mountain bike, commuter bike, and a new hybrid bike on the trip
User will use a sturdy bike rack or trailer capable of holding four bikes on the vehicle
User will bring multiple locks and chains to secure the bikes when not in use
User will confirm each accommodation can accommodate all four bikes
User will use high-quality bike covers or bags to protect the bikes during transport
User will perform regular bike maintenance checks using a basic tool kit, spare tubes, and a pump
User has a new bike computer and tracks progress on Strava
